services.title: General Repairs

about.heading: Reliable Handyman Services in Richmond
about.body: Tan the Handyman, LLC provides professional home repair and maintenance services throughout Richmond, Virginia. We understand that your home is your biggest investment, and we're committed to helping you maintain it properly. Our experienced team tackles projects both big and small with attention to detail and fair pricing.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Tan was incredibly reliable and did excellent work fixing our kitchen cabinets and installing new shelving. He showed up on time, cleaned up after himself, and his prices were very fair. Will definitely call him again for future projects!

reviews.name: Mike R.
reviews.text: Had Tan repair some drywall damage and paint our guest bathroom. Professional work, attention to detail, and he even helped us pick the right paint color. Great communication throughout the entire process.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Tan helped us with multiple small repairs around our older home - fixing squeaky doors, replacing outlets, and patching holes. He's honest, skilled, and reasonably priced. Highly recommend for any handyman needs!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Richmond & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional handyman services throughout Central Virginia

cta.heading: Ready to Fix That Project?
cta.body: Don't let small repairs turn into big problems. Contact Tan the Handyman, LLC today for reliable service and fair pricing.
